caller_profiles.description: Phone-hash-based caller profile system. New caller_profiles DB table with SHA-256 hashed phone numbers (no raw PII). Lookup on assistant-request injects returning caller context into system prompt. Profile updated on end-of-call with call count, topics, satisfaction.

knowledge_index.description: Generated 93-entry knowledge index from Knowledge/zo-hotline/. Replaced ~200-line hardcoded conceptFiles map with dynamic index-based lookup. explainConcept tool now uses fuzzy matching with fallback to partial key matching.

call_spotlights.description: New call_spotlights table with automated flag rules: dropped (<30s), high_engagement (>5min), negative_feedback (sat 1-2), escalation_requested, returning_caller. Flags computed in end-of-call handler and inserted to DB.

tool_usage_logging.description: Structured per-call tool usage logging. Each tool invocation is appended to tool_usage.jsonl with timestamp, tool name, params, and associated call ID. Enables messaging effectiveness analysis.

prompt_trim.description: System prompt trimmed from 1,925 to 901 words (53% reduction). All behavioral rules preserved — removed redundant prose, consolidated sections, tightened instructions. Version 3.0.

verification.db_tables_created: caller_profiles and call_spotlights verified in DuckDB
